news.headline: IAC to reveal Q3 2024 earnings on Nov 11, with CEO Joey Levin's letter; Host earnings call on Nov 12.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, following the closure of market trading on Monday, November 11, 2024, IAC (NASDAQ: IAC) will release its third-quarter results. Alongside this, CEO Joey Levin will issue a letter to shareholders. This communication may contain forward-looking details and insights.

news.headline: Equifax experienced strong Q3 2024 revenue growth with $1.442 billion (9% increase). Workforce Solutions saw 7% Q3 growth to $620.0 million, while USIS had 12% growth to $476.9 million. International revenue grew by 9% to $344.9 million. Net income was $141.3 million, down 13% from Q3 2023, and EPS was $1.13 per share, down 14%. Guidance for Q4 2024 and FY 2024 includes reported revenue growth estimates ranging from 8.3% to 9.9%. Equifax operates in 24 countries and employs nearly 15,000 people. More info: www.equifax.com.
news.summary: Equifax announced its financial results for Q3 2024, with revenue reaching $1.442 billion, up 9%. The non-mortgage local currency revenue grew by 10%, while USIS saw revenue growth of 12%, led by 36% mortgage revenue growth. International revenue increased by 18% on a local currency basis. Adjusted EPS was $1.85, up 5% compared to Q3 2023. The net income was $141.3 million, down 13% from the prior year. Equifax provided guidance for Q4 2024 and FY 2024, estimating reported revenue between $5.700 billion to $5.720 billion for the full year. The company emphasized its strong performance in new product innovation, leveraging EFX Cloud, AI, and machine learning capabilities. Equifax aims for long-term 8-12% revenue growth and higher margins. The company operates in 24 countries across North America, South America, Europe, and the Asia Pacific region, with nearly 15,000 employees worldwide.

news.headline: Rexford Industrial reported Q3 2024 financial results including $65.1 million net income, $130.0 million Core FFO, and NOI of $183.5 million. Company ended Q3 with $61.8 million in cash, $995.0 million available credit, and $3.4 billion debt. Acquisitions totaled $60.5 million. Year-to-date investments were $1.4 billion. Dividend declared for Q4 2024. Company updates full year 2024 guidance: Net Income per share $1.20-$1.22, Core FFO per share $2.33-$2.35. Balance Sheet remains strong. Transaction details and lease activity discussed. Guidance details full year expectations.
news.summary: Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. announced its financial results for Q3 2024 with various highlights. Net income attributable to common stockholders was $65.1 million, or $0.30 per diluted share, showing an increase from the prior year quarter. Company's Core FFO was $130.0 million, up by 13.1%. Consolidated Portfolio NOI was $183.5 million, rising by 17.6%. Comparable rental rates increased significantly. Acquisitions totaled $60.5 million, with sales of one property at $7.3 million. The Company ended the quarter with a low-leverage balance sheet. The Same Property Portfolio NOI increased by 2.6% with an average occupancy rate of 96.9%. Transaction activity details and updates on balance sheet and dividends were provided. The Company also updated its full-year 2024 guidance, showing positive growth expectations. Additional details and cautionary statements were provided regarding forward-looking statements and non-GAAP financial measures. The article offers an in-depth report on Rexford Industrial's financial performance in Q3 2024, highlighting its position in the real estate market.

news.headline: Jump Trading sued over alleged 'pump-and-dump' scheme in game developer case, per reports.
Health Canada approves Acadia Pharmaceuticals' DAYBUE™ (trofinetide) for Rett Syndrome in patients 2+. First drug for this in Canada.
news.summary: In San Diego, Acadia Pharmaceuticals Inc. revealed that Health Canada has approved marketing for DAYBUE™ (trofinetide), targeting Rett syndrome in adult and pediatric patients aged two years and above. This authorization, granted through the Priority Review procedure, marks DAYBUE as the sole drug greenlit in Canada for treating Rett syndrome, a rare neurodevelopmental disorder. This approval represents a significant milestone for ACAD, listed on Nasdaq, as they look to address the needs of individuals affected by Rett syndrome.

news.headline: Altura Mental Health launches mental health programs in San Diego, offering IOP, PHP, and VIOP for teens and adults.
news.summary: Altura Mental Health, a reputable mental healthcare provider, has recently inaugurated a new facility in San Diego, California. This expansion aims to bring their extensive Intensive Outpatient Program (IOP), Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP), and Virtual Intensive Outpatient Program (VIOP) to the San Diego metro area. This move is significant as it will now offer vital mental health services to individuals across the region. The new location is set to cater to a large population in need of these services.

A conference call will then take place the following day, Wednesday, October 30, 2024, at 11:00 am Eastern Time to discuss these results. To participate, individuals can dial 1-877-407-9208 or 1-201-493-6784 and request to join the Mirion Technologies, Inc. earnings call. Additionally, a live webcast of the call will be available.

news.headline: Prada unveils futuristic spacesuit designed for NASA's upcoming moon landing, made with Axiom's technology.
news.summary: Prada's expertise in materials is being combined with Axiom's technology to create the AxEMU suit for NASA's upcoming return to the moon. This collaboration aims to enhance the astronauts' performance and safety during the mission. The partnership between Prada and Axiom underscores the importance of innovation in space exploration. This cutting-edge suit is set to play a vital role in NASA's lunar surface endeavors, showcasing a blend of fashion and function for the next chapter of space exploration.

news.headline: T-Mobile to redeem $1.5 billion of Sprint's 7.625% Notes due Feb 15, 2025 on Nov 15, 2024 at 100% of principal plus interest.
news.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. revealed that its subsidiary, Sprint LLC, is set to redeem all outstanding 7.625% Notes due February 15, 2025. The redemption, scheduled for November 15, 2024, involves a total of $1.5 billion in aggregate principal amount. The redemption price is set at 100% of the principal sum of the notes to be redeemed, in addition to accrued interest up to the redemption date but not inclusive of it. This move signifies a significant financial undertaking by the company, demonstrating its commitment to managing its liabilities effectively.

news.headline: CA educators benefit from grant to pursue admin credential, thanks to DELPI initiative.Hundreds returning to school in 2024-25.

news.headline: Optinose grants 185,000 stock options to 8 employees to join, outside 2010 stock plan, under Nasdaq rule.

(NASDAQ:OPTN), a pharmaceutical company catering to patients treated by ear, nose, and throat (ENT) and allergy specialists, recently disclosed that they have provided non-qualified stock option awards to acquire a total of 185,000 shares of its common stock to eight incoming employees. This move was made to entice these individuals to join OptiNose. The stock option awards were issued separately from the OptiNose, Inc. 2010 Stock Incentive Plan, adhering to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: iRhythm Technologies scheduled to release Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 30, 2024.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs, surpassing economists' expectations. The stock market also saw a boost, with the main indexes increasing by 3% on average. This positive trend is attributed to increased consumer spending and confidence in the market, as well as ongoing efforts to stimulate economic growth. While the situation remains dynamic, experts are optimistic about the current trajectory and its potential impact on the overall economic outlook.

news.headline: Spero Therapeutics presents SPR719 data at IDWeek 2024 showing low resistance development in NTM-PD MAC strains.
news.summary: Studies conducted on SPR719 revealed that there is a minimal risk of developing resistance in non-tuberculous mycobacterial pulmonary disease caused by Mycobacterium avium complex strains. This was observed when SPR719 was used alone or in conjunction with standard treatment agents. The data from in vitro testing indicate a promising potential of SPR719 in combating this type of infection, highlighting its efficacy and potential to be a viable treatment option.

news.headline: PPG's Q3 2024 financial results: Net sales $4.575B (-1%), Net income $468M (+10%), EPS $2.00 (+12%). CEO Tim Knavish comments.
news.summary: Pittsburgh-based company PPG (NYSE:PPG) released its financial outcomes for the third quarter of 2024. The consolidated results for the quarter indicate net sales totaling $4.575 billion, with a slight decrease of 1% from the same period in 2023 when net sales were $4.644 billion. Net income for the third quarter of 2024 was reported at $468 million, compared to $426 million in 2023, showing an increase of 10%. Adjusted net income for this quarter was $500 million, slightly up from $493 million in the previous year. Earnings per share (EPS) for Q3 2024 were $2.00, up by 12% from $1.79 in Q3 2023, while adjusted EPS stood at $2.13, increasing by 3% from $2.07 in the prior year. Tim Knavish, the Chairman and CEO of PPG, provided remarks on the financial results.

news.headline: Crown Castle's Q3 2024 results revealed maintained full-year outlook, except for reduced net income.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE: CCI) announced its third-quarter results for the period ending September 30, 2024. The company confirmed its full-year 2024 Outlook, noting a decrease in net income.
